heading: Oceanographic research
label: 715 Oceanographic research
text: The Coast Guard shall conduct such oceanographic research, use such equipment or instruments, and collect and analyze such oceanographic data, in cooperation with other agencies of the Government, or not, as may be in the national interest.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 94 of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 94 of this title
